summary: Adjusted the opening to differentiate Chapter 3 from the adjacent dawn-at-work bank opening while preserving Hester's investigation, chapter beats, and the existing handoff toward the bank morning in Chapter 4.
edits: Reframed the opening around Hester's dust-struck body and decision to investigate, rather than a static table inventory.
Removed the later duplicate cough paragraph after folding that material into the opening.
Kept the chapter ending and investigative setup intact so the transition into the next chapter still points toward the bank morning.
